layers.name: Chassis & Body Structure
layers.description: Main vehicle skeleton, frame rails, floor pan, firewall, pillars, doors, hood, trunk

layers.name: Engine Mechanical (1MZ-FE)
layers.description: Full 1MZ-FE cutaway engine block, heads, pistons, cams, valves, crankshaft, timing belt

layers.name: Engine Bay Wiring
layers.description: All wiring inside engine bay - ECU, sensors, coils, injectors, alternator harness

layers.name: Full Vehicle Wiring
layers.description: Complete body & chassis wiring harnesses color-coded by system

layers.name: Fuel System
layers.description: Fuel tank, lines, pump, filter, rail, injectors, EVAP canister

layers.name: Cooling System
layers.description: Radiator, water pump, hoses, thermostat, reservoir, fan, heater core

layers.name: Intake & Exhaust
layers.description: Intake manifold, throttle body, air filter, EGR, exhaust manifolds, catalytic converters

layers.name: Suspension & Steering
layers.description: Front & rear suspension, struts, control arms, sway bars, steering rack & column

layers.name: Brake System
layers.description: Master cylinder, ABS unit, calipers, rotors, lines, parking brake

layers.name: Body Electrical
layers.description: Lights, switches, power windows, mirrors, door locks, interior lighting

layers.name: HVAC & Climate Control
layers.description: Heater core, A/C compressor, evaporator, blower motor, control panel

layers.name: Drivetrain & Transmission
layers.description: Automatic transmission (U140E), torque converter, axles, differential
